steps.title: Determine what the underlined portion is doing in context
steps.content: The passage opens by explaining why ordinary bubbles pop (evaporation or drainage), then says Roux and colleagues found ways to mitigate those factors — producing bubbles lasting a year or more. The phrase For example introduces the underlined sentence, so it must illustrate one of those mitigation methods. The underlined text explains that glycerol clings to water molecules, letting the bubble draw water from surrounding air to offset evaporation.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices, confirm the match
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'It describes the effects of a process devised by researchers that increases the longevity of an object discussed in the text.': The underlined portion explains exactly how glycerol extends bubble life by compensating for evaporation — a concrete effect of the researchers’ process. ✓
  • Choice B — 'It details the circumstances that prompted the research discussed in the text.': The circumstances that prompted research (bubbles pop quickly) are in the first sentence, not the underlined portion. ✗
  • Choice C — 'It presents a reason why the phenomenon...the researchers wanted to avoid will inevitably occur.': The underlined portion shows how evaporation is prevented, not why it is inevitable — this reverses the logic. ✗
  • Choice D — 'It mentions a method discussed in the text that researchers intend to test in future experiments.': No future experiments are mentioned anywhere; the glycerol method is a completed discovery. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
